title: prostanthera askania
intro: Prostanthera askania, also known as Askania rose, is a flowering plant species in the mint family. It is native to Western Australia and has been used for its medicinal properties for centuries. Prostanthera askania contains compounds like ursolic acid and oleanolic acid, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits, including soothing digestive issues and reducing fever. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of applications.
